name: codsworth
description: Plugin marketplace for Codsworth — build-verify-fix tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Codebase-aware specification engine. Researches your code deeply, then conducts a grounded interview to produce foundry-ready specs. Forge plans. Foundry builds.

plugins.name: foundry
plugins.description: Autonomous build-verify-fix loop with 4-stream verification (TRACE, PROVE, SIGHT, TEST), defect grinding, and spec-before-code assay. Forge plans. Foundry builds.
